title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Urban Ladder Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Urban Ladder Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Ladder Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Urban Ladder Advisory Limited:
Urban Ladder Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
